div1.entryFree: Augurer, soothsayer in ancient Rome: the a. tells me, Cor. II, 1, 1. the persuasion of his --s, Caes. II, 1, 200. the --s, . . . . plucking the entrails of an offering forth, II, 2, 37. swallows have built in Cleopatra's sails their nests: the --s say they know not, Ant. IV, 12, 4 (O. Edd. auguries). you are too sure an a. V, 2, 337.
